name: provenance manifest emitter populates the consumption blocks from the live freshness gate output
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance .claude-tdd-pro/standards/last-fetch && printf '2026-05-13T00:00:00Z\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/standards/last-fetch/owasp-asvs.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/emit-provenance-manifest.sh" --commit abc --standards-cited owasp-asvs --now 2026-05-13T01:00:00Z --out .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json 2>err.txt && grep -q '"owasp-asvs"' .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json && grep -q '"freshness_at_generation":"fresh-within-fetch-frequency"' .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json && echo ok 1>&2
